messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a TelemetryStream aggregate in TypeScript. Commands: open, ingest, seal. Export initialState, decide, and evolve as a record. Sealing a TelemetryStream that was never opened must throw a typed DomainError.

Write a Decider for a FleetVehicle aggregate in TypeScript covering enroll, assign, and retire. Assigning a retired vehicle must throw; enrolling the same vehicle twice must throw. Include an exhaustive evolve with a never default.
Explain briefly how a Decider separates decide from evolve, then implement a GeoFence Decider in TypeScript with define, activate, and breach commands. Breach is only valid while active.

Write a TypeScript Decider for a DispatchBeacon aggregate. Constraints: no any, discriminated unions for commands/events/state, throw a typed BeaconError on invariant violations, events carry any clock or identity the aggregate needs.
Build a Decider for a RouteOptimisation aggregate in TypeScript. Commands: plan, reroute, complete. Rerouting after completion must throw RouteError. Include the full Decider record and pure evolve.
What's the event-sourcing way to model a DriverAssessment aggregate with a Decider in TypeScript? Show a minimal example with score, sign, and revoke commands.
Build an Oskar-style projection using a when reducer for a TelemetryStream read view that denormalises sampleCount and lastValue. Use aggregateStream and a type guard.
How do I project a FleetVehicle event stream into a query-friendly read model in TypeScript? Show a project function with an empty view and selective event handling.

Write a TypeScript projection for an IncidentReport view. Constraints: denormalise severity and assignee, discriminated event union, strict types, return view unchanged for events outside the view's interest.
Explain briefly how a versioned snapshot upgrade pipeline works, then implement one for a FleetVehicle aggregate in TypeScript with two upgraders chained in order.
Build a Snapshot type and an upgradeSnapshot loader for a DispatchBeacon aggregate in TypeScript. Support three versions with two upgraders. Throw UpgradeError on unsupported versions.
How do I persist a VehicleInspection snapshot with a version field and upgrade older snapshots on load in TypeScript? Show a minimal versioned Snapshot example.

Build an optimistic-concurrency append path for a TelemetryStream aggregate in TypeScript. Use a local EventStore interface with expectedRevision: bigint | 'no_stream' | 'any', and convert the store's conflict signal into a typed ConcurrencyConflict.

Write an optimistic-concurrency append for a GeoFence aggregate in TypeScript. Constraints: wrap the I/O in Effect.gen, use expectedRevision on appendToStream, surface a typed ConcurrencyConflict error.
Build a CommandHandler for a TelemetryStream aggregate in TypeScript. It should load events with readStream, call decide, then appendToStream with expectedRevision. Use a local EventStore interface.

Write a CommandHandler for a DriverAssessment aggregate in TypeScript. Constraints: wrap the IO boundary in Effect.gen, use a local EventStore interface, call decide and appendToStream with expectedRevision.
Explain briefly how a CommandHandler over an EventStore separates orchestration from decision logic, then implement one for a VehicleInspection aggregate in TypeScript.
Build a checkpointed subscription in TypeScript that replays RouteOptimisation events into a read model and persists the checkpoint after each applied event. Use a local CheckpointStore interface.
How do I run a resumable subscription for FleetVehicle events in TypeScript using Effect.gen for the IO boundary? Show a minimal example with a checkpoint store.

Write a TypeScript subscription runner for a MaintenanceWindow read model. Constraints: resumable from a checkpoint, crash-safe write order (apply then checkpoint), typed EventEnvelope, wrap the IO boundary in Effect.gen.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper plus a when reducer for a GeoFence aggregate in TypeScript. Fold a GeoFence event array into a strongly typed state with a type guard.
What's the event-sourcing way to fold an async iterable of TelemetryStream events into an aggregate state in TypeScript? Show an aggregateStream helper that accepts AsyncIterable.
Explain briefly how an Oskar-style when + aggregateStream differs from a Decider's evolve, then implement both for a VehicleInspection aggregate in TypeScript.

Build an upcast function in TypeScript that migrates older GeoFence stored events to the current shape. Switch on { type, version } and throw UnknownEventError on unmatched combinations. Include an evolve that consumes the upcasted event.
How do I upcast older DispatchBeacon stored events into the current shape without rewriting the stream, then feed them into a projection? Show an upcast + project in TypeScript.

Build a read-model rebuild function in TypeScript for a FleetVehicle projection. Read events in batches from a given revision, apply project, persist the batch, and advance the cursor. Resumable via a `from` option.

Write a TypeScript rebuild routine for an IncidentReport read model. Constraints: resumable from a `from` revision, chunked batches, persist after each batch, advance a revision cursor. Use a local event-store reader interface.

Build a minimal CQRS boundary for a RouteOptimisation aggregate in TypeScript. handleCommand uses a Decider and EventStore with expectedRevision; queryView reads from a separate read store. Share the event type but not the state type.
Explain briefly why a CQRS boundary keeps write-side state separate from read-side view, then implement handleCommand and queryView for a TelemetryStream aggregate in TypeScript.

Build a stateless saga skeleton in TypeScript that reacts to DispatchBeacon events and emits commands for a RouteOptimisation aggregate. react returns null for events outside the saga's interest. Show at least three steps.

Write a TypeScript process manager that coordinates GeoFence breaches with FleetVehicle dispatch. Constraints: pure (state, event) => { nextState, command? } function, typed discriminated unions, exhaustive match with never.
Build a translate function in TypeScript that maps FleetVehicle domain events to versioned IntegrationEvents. Internal events (enrollment, retirement) translate to null; only assignment publishes.

How do I implement the outbox pattern for a GeoFence aggregate in TypeScript? Show appendWithOutbox that inserts outbox rows and appends to the stream in one transaction, with a comment describing the publisher's role.

Fix this FuelEfficiencyReport decide so it throws a typed DomainError on invariant violation and the switch is exhaustive with a never default.

```typescript
function decide(c: any, s: any) { return []; }
```
